name: 简约双线条分割线
author: r-markdown
content:
<!-- 素材开始 -->
<container direction="column" margin="20px 0">
<container width="100%" margin="0 0 -13px 0" direction="column" align="end-end">
<container width="20px" height="20px" bg="#f4b710" radius="50%" translate="-20px,10px"></container>
<container width="15px" height="15px" bg="#abee1b" radius="50%"></container>
<container width="10px" height="10px" bg="#2ee5d9" radius="50%" translate="-15px"></container>
</container>

<container width="90%" height="5px" radius="4px 10px 10px 4px" rotate="1deg" extra-style="background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(192, 245, 188, 1), rgba(192, 245, 188, 0.3));"></container>

<container width="90%" height="5px" margin="6px 0 0 10%" radius="4px 10px 10px 4px" rotate="1deg" extra-style="background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(20, 130, 70, 1), rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.1));"></container>
</container>
<!-- 素材结束 -->
